title: Gastrochilus bifidus
taxonomy: Gastrochilus bifidus is a species of orchid in the genus Gastrochilus. This genus is part of the subtribe Gastrochilinae, which is within the family Orchidaceae. The subtribe Gastrochilinae is a group of orchids that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Gastrochilus bifidus is native to the Himalayas and is often found growing on trees and rocks. The classification of Gastrochilus bifidus reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other orchid species.
